goals.text: Migrate data storage to physical JSON files
Refactor navigation dock styling to glassmorphic design
Optimize iframe loading states and welcome animations
Add guide checkboxes to Procedural Guide library
Review new calendar designs with the product owner
modularize the APPHUB structure for easy maintenance
Ensure Light & Dark mode is fully implemented in every page
Add paybill & bank transfer for checkouts
Set up ground work for the platform's Subscription with role based access for features they pay for
